title: A Pause for Appreciation
subtitle: A 5–7 Minute Guided Reflection

intro.text1: When a relationship feels strained, it can become easy to focus only on what is not working. This reflection offers a brief pause — not to dismiss concerns, but to gently broaden perspective.
intro.text2: There is no expectation to feel grateful. Simply notice what comes up.

breathing.title: Arrive and Settle
breathing.description: Before continuing, allow yourself a brief pause. This moment is not about solving anything. It is about creating space.
breathing.affirmation: "I can acknowledge what feels difficult and still remain open to noticing."

prompts.p1: One small moment recently with your partner that did not feel tense was…
prompts.p1_ex: "We had a brief, calm conversation in the evening."
prompts.p2: One effort your partner has made — even if imperfect — is…
prompts.p2_ex: "They attempted to explain their feelings instead of withdrawing."
prompts.p3: One quality in your partner that has remained consistent over time is…
prompts.p3_ex: "They continue to show dedication toward our responsibilities."

intention.title: How would you like to hold this reflection?

options.private: I would prefer to keep this reflection private.
options.share_part: I may choose to share part of this with my partner.
options.share_full: I would like to share this reflection fully.
options.save_later: I will save this for a later conversation.

checkin.title: As you completed this reflection, which statement feels most accurate?

statements.s1: I feel slightly more open toward my partner right now.
statements.s2: I do not notice much change, but I am willing to stay aware.
statements.s3: I found this somewhat difficult to complete.
statements.s4: I experienced a small sense of warmth during reflection.
statements.s5: I noticed resistance, and that feels important to acknowledge.
statements.s6: I feel a subtle softening compared to before I began.

closing.title: Reflection Complete
closing.text1: This pause does not erase challenges. It simply restores balance in how the relationship is viewed.
closing.text2: Even brief moments of noticing can gradually soften emotional rigidity and create space for healthier conversations.

history.title: Your Reflection History
history.noReflections: No reflections saved yet. Your completed sessions will appear here.
